channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NDIS transition prompts planned job cuts for early childhood disability coordinators in Victoria
item.description: The Brotherhood of St Laurence (BSL) is preparing to cut up to 45 early childhood coordinator roles in Victoria as it shifts its service focus and responds to changing demand across disability support...

item.title: El-Rufai Jr. says his father would have likely resigned if Tinubu appointed him as minister
item.description: Bashir El-Rufai, son of ex-Kaduna governor Nasir El-Rufai, disputes claims linking his father’s criticism of APC and Tinubu to any ministerial appointment outcome. The piece cites a viral exchange on ...

item.title: Steven Guilbeault leaves Liberal caucus amid debate over Canada’s shifting climate policy priorities
item.description: Steven Guilbeault’s departure from the Liberal caucus has sparked renewed debate in Ottawa about the direction of Canada’s climate policy and the balance the Liberal Party is trying to strike between ...

item.title: California AG Files Lawsuit Against 23andMe Over 2023 Data Breach Affecting Millions
item.description: The California Attorney General, Rob Bonta, has filed a lawsuit against 23andMe, the genetic testing company, alleging that it failed to adequately protect customer data during a 2023 breach. Nearly 7...

item.title: Tactical analysis: How Arsenal could beat PSG in the Champions League final
item.description: Arsenal head into their Champions League final against Paris Saint-Germain with a clear contrast in styles shaping expectations: Mikel Arteta’s side are built on controlled possession and defensive so...

item.title: Donna Brazile deflects questions on Jill Biden comments and urges Democrats to focus on future elections
item.description: Former Democratic National Committee interim chair Donna Brazile declined to engage in discussion about recent comments made by former First Lady Jill Biden regarding President Joe Biden’s performance...

item.title: New Zealand dominate Ireland by an innings and 79 runs in Belfast ahead of England Test series
item.description: New Zealand captain Tom Latham expressed satisfaction after his side delivered a commanding performance against Ireland in a one-off Test match in Belfast, securing victory by an innings and 79 runs. ...

item.title: Nigeria debuts Para and Poomsae athletes at African Taekwondo Championships
item.description: Nigeria don enter 2026 African Taekwondo Championships wey dey hold for Bamako, Mali with 13-member squad wey include Para Taekwondo and Poomsae athletes for first time for the country's history. This...

item.title: D.K. Shivakumar begins tenure as Karnataka Chief Minister amid political and organisational challenges
item.description: D.K. Shivakumar is set to assume office as the Chief Minister of Karnataka after a prolonged wait of three years, marking a significant milestone in his long political journey. His elevation comes fol...

item.title: Asad Qaiser claims movement restrictions disrupted his travel for GB election campaign visit
item.description: Senior Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) leader Asad Qaiser has alleged that he was stopped from reaching Islamabad airport due to road blockades, which caused him to miss a scheduled flight to Skardu. H...

item.title: Ghana anti-LGBTQ law draws mixed reactions from supporters and critics
item.description: Ghana’s proposed legislation often referred to as the Human Sexual Rights and Family Values Bill, commonly described as an ‘anti-LGBTQ’ law, has generated strong and divided reactions both within the ...

item.title: Study finds caffeine may restore social memory circuits disrupted by sleep deprivation
item.description: Researchers from the Yong Loo Lin School of Medicine at the National University of Singapore have identified a potential mechanism by which caffeine may help counteract certain cognitive impairments c...

item.title: Australian housing market slows as buyers and sellers wait after federal budget tax changes
item.description: Australia’s residential property market has entered a noticeable slowdown following the federal budget and proposed tax changes introduced by the Labor government. According to market participants and...

item.title: CUET-UG 2026 first shift delayed after technical issue at multiple centres; NTA provides compensatory time
item.description: The first shift of the Common University Entrance Test-Undergraduate (CUET-UG) 2026 was delayed by over two hours at several examination centres across different States in India on May 30, 2026, follo...

item.title: DNA test may help many breast cancer patients over 40 avoid chemotherapy, study finds
item.description: An international clinical trial suggests that a significant proportion of breast cancer patients could safely avoid chemotherapy thanks to a new DNA-based test. The study, led by University College Lo...

item.title: White House Aliens.gov Website Faces Scrutiny Over ICE Arrest Data and Design Framing Immigrants as Aliens
item.description: A WIRED investigation reports on a controversial White House website, Aliens.gov, which presents immigration enforcement data in a space-themed, extraterrestrial framing. The site claims that U.S. Imm...

item.title: The Life and Career of Aud Egede-Nissen: Norwegian Silent Film Star and Pioneer
item.description: Aud Egede-Nissen (1893–1974) was a groundbreaking Norwegian actress, producer, and theater director who became a prominent figure in German silent cinema. She began her film career in 1913 in Copenhag...

item.title: Ottawa Launches Annual Giveaway Weekend with Citywide Scavenger Hunt
item.description: Ottawa is reviving its popular Giveaway Weekend, offering residents and visitors an opportunity to participate in a citywide scavenger hunt. The event encourages people to explore various neighbourhoo...

item.title: Bulls prepare for tough URC quarter-final against Munster
item.description: The Bulls are set for a challenging United Rugby Championship quarter-final against Munster in Pretoria on Saturday, following a disappointing result for Connacht against Glasgow Warriors on Friday ni...

item.title: Opinion criticizes proposed UFC-style event at the White House for U.S. 250th anniversary
item.description: This opinion article expresses strong criticism of reported plans to stage a UFC-style mixed martial arts event on the White House grounds as part of celebrations for the United States' 250th annivers...
